description: The Ico Sphere Mesh SH1 component creates Ico Sphere data using Sphercal harmonics.

fields.Radius: The radius of the ico sphere visual.
fields.FlatShading: Whether the mesh should be flat shaded.
fields.FlatFaceExtrude: How much to puff up the mesh.
fields.FlatFaceScale: How much to scale up the faces of the mesh.
fields.Colors: The spherical harmonic colors to use.
fields.RadiusMultiplier: The spherical harmonics to use to influence the mesh radius at different spots.
fields.NegativeRadiusInvertsColor: Whether negative colors invert the mesh geometry.
